description: Archived resolved residuals from V1.30 post-QC tech-debt batch. V1.35 P0 (commits aafe1f8, 26b2fa8) closed TD-V130-02 and TD-V130-06.

entries.title: SessionCapture RwLock uses write() for all accesses — cosmetic under single-threaded IPC
entries.note: Benign in current single-threaded IPC model. Revisit if worker becomes concurrent. Consider parking_lot::RwLock.

entries.title: cleanup_row fire-and-forget — DELETE failure silently lost, dangling registry rows possible
entries.source: qc2 W-003, qc3 W-003 (V1.30 P0 review)
entries.target: Resolved by V1.35 P0 (commit aafe1f8) — cleanup_row now logs DELETE failures via tracing::error (added tracing dep to nexus-local-db/Cargo.toml).
entries.closure_evidence: commit aafe1f8 on feature/v1.35-critical-residual-convergence; tracing error log added to cleanup_row; clippy clean.
entries.closure_note: Resolved per closure_evidence: commit aafe1f8 on feature/v1.35-critical-residual-convergence; tracing error log added to cleanup_row; clippy clean.. Status.json SSOT refreshed in commit 4a4ba9d (tech_debt_summary) and 13a4b6d (residual lifecycle).

entries.title: JobLifecycleGuard FSM — no RAII guard to ensure mark_done/mark_failed called exactly once
entries.note: Mark_done now runs before KeyBlock insert (W-001 fix), reducing risk. Full guard would eliminate the class.

entries.title: Drop timeout 150ms may be insufficient for heavy LLM children — make configurable
entries.note: PID existence check added (C-4 fix). Configurable timeout via TimeoutConfig would improve safety.

entries.title: LIST_BY_WORLD_LIMIT=500 silently truncates — no truncation indicator to caller
entries.note: Pre-release volumes well under 500. Add total_count or has_more field when scale requires it.

entries.title: mark_running lacks WHERE status guard — can revert done/failed jobs
entries.target: Resolved by V1.35 P0 (commit aafe1f8) — mark_running now has WHERE status='queued' guard, mirroring claim_job pattern.
entries.closure_evidence: commit aafe1f8 on feature/v1.35-critical-residual-convergence; kb_extract_job tests cover queued→running transition and reject done/failed.
entries.closure_note: Resolved per closure_evidence: commit aafe1f8 on feature/v1.35-critical-residual-convergence; kb_extract_job tests cover queued→running transition and reject done/failed.. Status.json SSOT refreshed in commit 4a4ba9d (tech_debt_summary) and 13a4b6d (residual lifecycle).

entries.title: claim_job re-fetches row after commit solely for started_at timestamp
entries.note: Extra DB round-trip for started_at. Could compute in Rust post-commit. Low priority optimization.

entries.title: insert_with_retry returns generic Configuration error on collision — should use dedicated type
entries.note: UUIDv4 makes collision near-impossible. Error type improvement for API clarity.

entries.title: Dynamic SQL (format!) in reference_source::list and kb_store::list_by_world — not parameterized
entries.note: Limit/offset now clamped (C-2 fix). format! needed because sqlx offline mode cannot bind LIMIT/OFFSET. Document exception.

entries.title: Extraction prompt format!() doubles memory for large work entries
entries.note: Typical work entries are small structured summaries. Streaming approach if large-file support added.

entries.title: sqlx prepare CI enforcement — ensure offline metadata stays green after query changes
entries.note: .sqlx/ metadata churn in diff expected after query changes. Add CI step to verify sqlx prepare is current.
